content:
# GPU Monitoring + Inference Health — Implementation Complete (2026-03-26)

PR #9 (feat/gpu-monitoring-inference-health) implements corvia#5 and corvia#6.

## 9 commits, 3 crates changed:
- corvia-common: GpuProcess, InferenceHealthStatus, InferenceProbeStatus types; health_probe_interval_secs + drift_threshold config
- corvia-proto: HealthResponse extended with 8 new fields (ep_name through last_probe_at)
- corvia-inference: probe.rs module with canary, periodic probe loop, TOCTOU-safe init, JoinHandle stored
- corvia-server: NVIDIA power/process metrics, intel_gpu_top integration, 5s cache with stampede guard, gRPC Health() integration

## Key implementation details:
- embed_canary() helper added to EmbeddingServiceImpl to bypass tonic wrapping
- Canary triggers in LoadModel handler on first embedding model (not server boot)
- ProbeState uses tokio::sync::RwLock; write-lock CAS prevents race on concurrent LoadModel
- nvidia-smi stays CSV (not XML) with 3s timeout; separate --query-compute-apps for processes
- intel_gpu_top spawned with SIGKILL in all paths; binary existence checked first
- GpuMetricsCache uses refreshing flag for stampede protection
